reasoning: Initial observation shows V = 20.0 when I = 2.0 and R = 10.0. To determine the relationship, I should first increase I to see if V changes proportionally.
Increasing I from 2.0 to 3.0 resulted in V increasing from 20.0 to 30.0, suggesting V is directly proportional to I when R remains constant.

Since V increased proportionally with I when R was held constant, we can conclude that V is directly proportional to I. The initial observation shows V = 40.0 when I = 4.0 and R = 10.0, suggesting the relationship is V = I * (V/I) = I * (40/4) = I * 10. To confirm this, I will now decrease I to see if V follows the same proportionality rule.
The relationship V = I * 10 has been confirmed by both increasing and decreasing I while keeping R constant. Further steps are unnecessary as the equation is clear.
